title: Notification queue backlog
description: Email notifications are delayed because workers are throttled by an outdated config.

logs.message: Worker rate limit set too low: WORKER_RATE_LIMIT=5 messages/sec
Queue backlog growing: processing 5/sec while enqueue rate is 42/sec
POST /notify accepted with normal response times

alerts.message: notification-worker throttled by low WORKER_RATE_LIMIT causing queue backlog

ground_truth.correct_fix: Increase the WORKER_RATE_LIMIT environment variable in the notification-worker deployment to match current queue throughput requirements. The current limit is too low for the message volume. Update the config, redeploy, and monitor drain rate. Add an alert on queue backlog depth to detect this automatically in future.
